HomePage.title: Welcome to Next.js with Internationalization
HomePage.description: This is a demo of Next.js with next-intl for internationalization.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.description: Learn more about our company and mission.
AboutPage.content: We are a company dedicated to building amazing web applications with the latest technologies.

AuthPage.loginError: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
AuthPage.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
AuthPage.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
AuthPage.termsTitle: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
AuthPage.termsOfServiceContent: By using our services, you agree to comply with and accept all the terms and conditions set forth. You commit not to use the service for purposes that violate the law, cause harm, or affect the rights of others. We reserve the right to change, suspend, or terminate the service without prior notice.
AuthPage.privacyPolicyContent: We are committed to protecting all personal information you provide, using it only for the purpose of providing and improving our services. Your information will not be shared with third parties except when required by law or with your consent. You have the right to request access, edit, or delete personal information at any time.
AuthPage.registrationSuccessfulDescription: Your account has been created successfully!
AuthPage.emailVerificationSent: We've sent a verification email to your inbox.
AuthPage.verificationInstructions: Please click the verification link in the email to activate your account. Don't forget to check your spam folder if you don't see it.
AuthPage.registrationErrorDescription: We encountered an error while creating your account. Please try again.
AuthPage.invalidOrExpiredToken: Token expire, please get other link via email
AuthPage.confirmRegistrationDescription: Please confirm your registration details before proceeding.
AuthPage.name: Name
AuthPage.checkInboxMessage: Please check your inbox for the verification email we sent to:
AuthPage.contactSupportMessage: Please contact the email below for our support:
AuthPage.verificationLinkMissing: The verification link is missing or invalid
AuthPage.checkEmailAndRetry: Please check your email and click on the correct verification link
AuthPage.accountNowActive: Your email has been verified successfully! Your account is now active
AuthPage.changePasswordSuccessDescription: Your password has been updated successfully.

Setup2FA.title: Two-Factor Authentication
Setup2FA.description: Please enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.
Setup2FA.verificationAlreadyUsed: This verification link has already been used
Setup2FA.verificationUnknownError: An unexpected error occurred during verification
Setup2FA.verificationRetry: Please request a new verification email or contact support
Setup2FA.scanDescription: Open your authenticator app and scan the QR code above. Download
Setup2FA.manualEntryInstruction: If you cannot scan the barcode, please enter the secret code manually:

username.minLength: Username must be at least 3 characters

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.numeric: Password must contain at least one numeric character

agreeTerms.required: You must agree to the terms and conditions

SettingsPage.title: Settings
SettingsPage.description: Manage your account preferences and settings

language.title: Language
language.description: Applied to interface and all notification channels (Email, Telegram, Zalo)

currency.title: Currency Unit
currency.description: Used for conversion and display of asset values, transactions, deposits/withdrawals, price alerts and related financial information throughout the system.

timezone.title: Time Zone
timezone.description: Display time for activities such as placing orders, transactions, deposits/withdrawals and notifications throughout the system

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Manage your account security and authentication settings

authenticatorApp.title: Authenticator App
authenticatorApp.description: Use Google Authenticator to protect your account and transactions.
authenticatorApp.note1: To ensure the safety of your assets, withdrawal and redeem functions will be disabled for 24 hours after you turn off the authenticator app verification method.
authenticatorApp.note2: Two security verification methods are required when withdrawing funds and performing other operations. If you only use one verification method, your account will face higher risks.

email.title: Email
email.description: Use email to protect your transactions and account.

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.description: Use phone number to protect your transactions and account.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Change password is used to log into your account.
changePassword.successDescription: Your password has been updated successfully.

notification.title: Notification Settings
notification.description: Configure your notification preferences and channels

methods.title: Notification Methods
methods.description: Choose methods to receive notifications about transactions, accounts, etc.

content.title: Notification Content
content.description: Choose the content you want to receive notifications for

SettingsPage.allSettingsSaved: All settings are up to date
